sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong it zaw ning Topa hong it zaw ning
Khuk din' a kong thumna Nang hong ngai ding
Hi bang hi kong thumna Kazih hong it zaw ning
Hong it zaw ning hong it zaw ning

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ni dang leitung nopna ka lunggulh pen
Tu in kong deih Nang mah a hoih pha pen
Tu in kong deih Nang mah Khazih hong it zaw ning
Hong it zaw ning hong it zaw ning

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Dahna natna thuak hang pha mawh sa lo
Nangma sawltakte bang la ka sa zo
Ka sa khawm amau bang Khazih hong it zaw ning
Hong it zaw ning hong it zaw ning

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka sih laitakin ah Nang kong phat ding
Ka hu tawkna inah Ka vaikhak ding
Ka ngen lailai hihmah Khazih hong itzaw ning
Hong it zaw ning hong it zaw ning
